panVerification.title: Gold Loan
panVerification.subtitle: Apply for instant gold loan
panVerification.secondaryLinkText: How did you learn about us?
panVerification.termsFullText: I agree to the Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy of Aditya Birla Capital Digital and its lending partners (Lenders/LSPs). I hereby, authorize them to collect, store, verify, process, and access my credit information from credit bureaus to process my loan application. I confirm that I am eligible to apply and that my household's annual income is above ₹3 lakh.
panVerification.invalidPanError: Please enter a valid PAN in uppercase (e.g., ABCDE1234F)
panVerification.panNotFoundError: PAN details not found. Please recheck and try again
panVerification.softRejectError: We are unable to proceed with your application
